---
title: "The Rev. George Rundle Prynne"
---

## The Rev. George Rundle Prynne

**Dates:** (1818-1903)

### Description

Vicar of St. Peter’s, Plymouth

### Biography

He served from 16 Aug 1848 to his death as Vicar of St. Peter's, Plymouth; he married (17 April 1849) Emily Fellowes (d. 1901).  He was an enthusiastic Tractarian much involved in religious rows in Plymouth.

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
